name: Boothill
desc: A cyborg cowboy drifting among the stars. Extremely optimistic and unrestrained.\nHe is a member of the Galaxy Rangers who swore to punish the wretched by any and all means...\nHis flamboyant and brash actions were all to draw the attention of the Interastral Peace Corporation — the target of his revenge.

1.name: Dusty Trail's Lone Star
1.desc: When the battle starts, obtains 1 stack of Pocket Trickshot. When Boothill deals DMG, ignores <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of the enemy target's DEF.

2.name: Milestonemonger
2.desc: When in Standoff and gaining Pocket Trickshot, recovers <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> Skill Point(s) and increases Break Effect by <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak>, lasting for <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> turn(s). Can also trigger this effect when gaining Pocket Trickshot stacks that exceed the max limit. But cannot trigger repeatedly within one turn.

3.name: Marble Orchard's Guard
3.desc: Ultimate Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nBasic ATK Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>10</unbreak>.

4.name: Cold Cuts Chef
4.desc: When the enemy target in the Standoff is attacked by Boothill, the DMG they receive additionally increases by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>. When Boothill is attacked by the enemy target in the Standoff, the effect of him receiving increased DMG is offset by <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak>.

5.name: Stump Speech
5.desc: Skill Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nTalent Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.

6.name: Crowbar Hotel's Raccoon
6.desc: When triggering the Talent's <u>Break DMG</u>, additionally deals <u>Break DMG</u> to the target equal to <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of the original DMG multiplier and additionally deals <u>Break DMG</u> to adjacent targets equal to <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> of the original DMG multiplier.

10000014.name: Break DMG
10000014.desc: Break DMG increases with higher Break Effect, higher target max Toughness, and higher character levels.\nBreak DMG cannot CRIT Hit and is not affected by DMG Boost effects.

131501.name: Skullcrush Spurs
131501.desc: Deals Physical DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Boothill's ATK to one designated enemy target.
131501.simple_desc: Deals minor Physical DMG to one enemy.

131502.name: Sizzlin' Tango
131502.desc:
Forces Boothill and one designated enemy target into the "Standoff" state. Boothill's Basic ATK gets Enhanced, and he cannot use his Skill, lasting for <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> turn(s). This duration decreases by 1 at the start of Boothill's every turn.
The enemy target in the "Standoff" becomes Taunted. When this enemy target/Boothill gets attacked by the other party in the Standoff, the DMG they receive increases by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>/<unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak>.
After this target is defeated or becomes Weakness Broken, Boothill gains 1 stack of "Pocket Trickshot," then dispels the "Standoff."
This Skill cannot regenerate Energy. After using this Skill, the current turn does not end.
131502.simple_desc: Initiates <color=#f29e38ff>Standoff</color>. After the target in the Standoff is <color=#f29e38ff>defeated or Weakness Broken</color>, Boothill receives Pocket Trickshot and dispels the Standoff. Boothill <color=#f29e38ff>gains Enhanced Basic ATK</color> and this turn does not end.

131503.name: Dust Devil's Sunset Rodeo
131503.desc: Applies Physical Weakness to one designated enemy target, lasting for <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> turn(s).\nDeals Physical DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Boothill's ATK to the target and <u>delays their action</u> by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>.
131503.simple_desc: <color=#f29e38ff>Applies Physical Weakness</color> to one enemy, deals massive Physical DMG to them, and <u>delays their action</u>.

10000002.name: Delay Action
10000002.desc: Increases the target's waiting interval before the next action.

131504.name: Five Peas in a Pod
131504.desc: Each stack of Pocket Trickshot increases the Enhanced Basic Attack's Toughness Reduction by <unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak>, stacking up to <unbreak>#5[i]</unbreak> time(s).\nIf the target is <u>Weakness Broken</u> while the Enhanced Basic ATK is being used, based on the number of Pocket Trickshot stacks, deals <u>Break DMG</u> to this target equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>/<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>/<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak></color> of Boothill's Physical Break DMG. The max Toughness taken into account for this DMG cannot exceed <unbreak>#6[i]</unbreak> times the base Toughness Reduction of the Basic Attack "Skullcrush Spurs."\nAfter winning the battle, Boothill can retain Pocket Trickshot for the next battle.
131504.simple_desc: Pocket Trickshot increases the Enhanced Basic ATK's Toughness Reduction and additionally deals Physical <color=#f29e38ff>Break DMG</color> <color=#f29e38ff>if the target is Weakness Broken</color>. After winning the battle, retains Pocket Trickshot for the next battle.

10000006.name: Weakness Break State
10000006.desc: When enemy targets' Toughness is reduced to 0, they will enter the Weakness Break State, which delays their actions.

10000014.name: Break DMG
10000014.desc: Break DMG increases with higher Break Effect, higher target max Toughness, and higher character levels.\nBreak DMG cannot CRIT Hit and is not affected by DMG Boost effects.

131506.name: Attack
131506.desc: Attacks an enemy, and after entering combat, reduces their Toughness of the corresponding Type.

131507.name: 3-9× Smile
131507.desc: After the Technique is used, when casting the Skill for the first time in the next battle, applies the same Physical Weakness to the target as the one induced by the Ultimate, lasting for <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> turn(s).
131507.simple_desc: After the Technique is used, <color=#f29e38ff>inflicts Physical Weakness</color> on one enemy when casting the Skill for the first time in the next battle.

131508.name: Fanning the Hammer
131508.desc: Deals Physical DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Boothill's ATK to one designated enemy target.\nThe Enhanced Basic Attack cannot recover Skill Points and can only target the enemy that is in the "Standoff" state.
131508.simple_desc: Deals Physical DMG to one enemy. Can only attack the target in the "Standoff."

1.point_desc: Increase this character's CRIT Rate/CRIT DMG, by an amount equal to <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>/<unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak> of Break Effect, up to a max increase of <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak>/<unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak>.
While Boothill is in the Standoff, reduces the DMG he receives from targets that are not in the Standoff by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>.
When in Standoff and gaining Pocket Trickshot, regenerates <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> Energy. Can also trigger this effect when gaining Pocket Trickshot stacks that exceed the max limit.
